name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.8.2 fixes the SessionStart hook that never fired on Windows (exec-form cat → shell form) and repairs the 0.6.0 triage wording that suppressed inline idea-proposing on ordinary planning turns (ideation now survives on both tracks). On 0.8.0: all 18 remaining passive .NET pattern descriptions rewritten trigger-first. On 0.7.0: nhibernate-patterns (NH as first-class runtime). On 0.6.x: SessionStart hook, wired review chain, upstream sync, lazy-senior-dev, database-design-conventions + database-review.
